download.title: Download
download.searchPlaceholder: Paste a YouTube link (video or playlist) or type to search...
download.alreadyHave: This song is already in your library.
download.sslHintBefore: This looks like an SSL certificate error. If you are behind a corporate VPN, enable
download.playlistEmpty: The playlist is empty or could not be read.
download.playlistEnqueued: Playlist "{playlist}": {total} items · {enqueued} enqueued · {skipped} skipped (already in library or queued).

library.title: Library
library.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, artist, album or genre...
library.empty: Your library is empty. Download your first song from the Download tab.
library.alsoDeleteFile: Also delete the file from disk?
library.syncMetadataLoaded: Metadata loaded from {source}. Review it and save if it looks right.
library.syncMetadataNotFound: No reliable MusicBrainz match was found for this track.
library.mobileSyncInstructions: Scan this QR code with your mobile device to download "{title}".
library.mobileSyncDisabled: Mobile Sync is disabled. Enable it in Settings > Network.

playlists.title: Playlists
playlists.none: You don't have any playlists yet.
playlists.pickerFilter: Filter by title, artist, album or genre...
playlists.allAlreadyIn: All tracks in your library are already in this playlist.
playlists.empty: This playlist is empty. Add tracks from the Library or with the button above.

smart.title: Smart playlist
smart.subtitle: Build it by typing. Each filter becomes a chip, just like a search token.
smart.name: Name
smart.namePlaceholder: Late night metal, Chill instrumentals, 2026 favorites...
smart.previewEmpty: Add some filters to see matching tracks.
smart.saveRequirements: Add a name and at least one filter to enable saving.
smart.readyToSave: This smart playlist is ready to save.
smart.saveError: Could not save this smart playlist: {detail}
smart.dynamicNotice: This is a smart playlist. Its tracks update automatically from the saved filters.
smart.draftNotice: This smart playlist updates dynamically from the filters you save here.

hints.field: Type a field like artist, album or genre...
hints.valueList: Add values one by one, then finish the filter...

editor.title: Editor: {title}
editor.metadataDescription: Edit the track's title, artist, album and genre. These changes are written back into the file's ID3 tags.
editor.metadataLoaded: Metadata loaded from {source}. Review it and save if it looks right.
editor.metadataNotFound: No reliable MusicBrainz match was found for this track.
editor.filenameDescription: Rename the file on disk. The extension is preserved automatically.
editor.audioDescription: Trim the audio, add fades or change the volume. Overwrite the original file or export a new track.
editor.sourceUrlDescription: Original URL this track was downloaded from.
editor.sourceUrlEmpty: No source URL recorded for this track.

system.languageDescription: Language used across the app. Restart is not required.
system.minimizeDescription: When clicking × the app hides to the system tray instead of quitting.
system.miniPlayerDescription: Clicking the tray icon opens the floating mini player.
system.themeDescription: Select the look and feel of the app.

network.skipCertDescription: Enable this if you are behind a corporate VPN with SSL inspection. Disable it on trusted networks.
network.sonosDescription: Enables streaming to Sonos speakers. Starts an internal HTTP server on the local network.
network.mobileSyncDescription: Allows downloading songs to your mobile device by scanning a QR code. Starts an internal HTTP server.
network.mobileSyncPortDescription: Port for the mobile sync server. Use 0 for a random available port.
network.remoteControllerDescription: Control playback and watch current downloads from another device on this local network.
network.remoteControllerPortDescription: Port for the remote controller server. Use 0 for a random available port.
network.remoteControllerQr: Scan to open the remote controller
network.remoteControllerBetaDescription: The remote controller is in BETA: you may hit bugs, rough edges or missing translations. Please report anything that looks off.

sonos.title: Sonos
sonos.noDevicesFound: No Sonos devices found on the network.
sonos.sessionExpired: Sonos session expired after inactivity. Please start casting again.
sonos.deviceNotFoundDiscover: Sonos device {host} not found — run discover first.
sonos.connectFailed: Could not connect to Sonos device at {host}.

status.betaNotice: BETA: expect rough edges and occasional bugs.
